query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NOT NULL AND image_url != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as con_imagen,
  SUM(CASE WHEN image_url IS NULL OR image_url = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as sin_imagen
FROM recipes;
